✨v0 Agentic AI for React Developers

Prompt to Production in Minutes

v0 scaffolds entire features from prompts. You iterate with natural language. Ship production-ready React with Next.js, shadcn/ui, and Server Components.

Start Vibe Coding → See Comparisons

Built for Agentic Development

v0 isn't reactive. It understands intent, scaffolds features, and iterates intelligently.

Context-Aware Scaffolding

Entire feature trees from one prompt. Not snippets—full components with context preserved across iterations.

Vibe Coding Loop

Natural language refinement. "Add dark mode." "Reorganize columns." v0 understands and adapts.

Modern Stack Default

Next.js App Router, shadcn/ui, Server Components, TypeScript, Tailwind. Learn the stack →

GitHub-Native Sync

Push to branches. Deploy to Vercel. One-click. Your entire workflow, no copy-paste.

Your Agentic Workflow

From prompt to production. Four simple steps powered by intent-aware AI.

1

Write Your Prompt

Describe what you need in plain English. "Create a sales dashboard with revenue card, customer table, and trend chart."

2

Get Full Scaffolding

v0 generates entire component trees with Next.js, shadcn/ui, Server Components, and Tailwind. No snippets—full features.

3

Refine with Natural Language

Iterate instantly. "Add dark mode." "Reorganize columns." v0 understands context and adapts intelligently.

4

Deploy to Production

Push to GitHub with one click. Deploy to Vercel instantly. Your entire workflow, no copy-paste friction.

How Does v0 Compare?

See detailed comparisons why developers are choosing agentic AI over reactive tools.

v0 vs Other AI Tools: Quick Overview

v0 by Vercel

  • ✓ Native Next.js support
  • ✓ Vercel deployment integration
  • ✓ Latest AI models
  • ✓ Free tier available

Other AI Tools

  • ✓ Multiple framework support
  • ✓ Established user base
  • ✗ Limited AI capabilities
  • ✗ No free tier

Ship Features, Not Files

Start agentic development today. From prompt to production in minutes.

Launch Your First Project → Read the Docs
What is v0 by Vercel? ▾
v0 is an AI-powered UI generation tool by Vercel. You describe a component or page in plain English and v0 generates clean React + Tailwind code you can copy directly into your project.
Is v0 free to use? ▾
v0 has a free tier with limited monthly generations. Paid plans unlock higher limits and priority access.
Does v0 work with Next.js? ▾
Yes. v0 is built by the Vercel team and outputs components that are optimised for Next.js and the App Router out of the box.
